# Raylib Container — Overview

<!-- toc start open="true" depthStart="2" --><!-- toc end -->
<!-- backlinks start open="true" --><!-- backlinks end -->

This repository provides a Docker-based development environment for Raylib projects.

Home: [[Home]]

Image: published via GitHub (preferred). See the repository Packages/Images for details: https://github.com/gm64x/RayLibContainer

For full usage and OS-specific instructions, pick your platform below:

- Linux: [[Linux-Usage]]
- macOS: [[macOS-Compatibility]]
- Windows: [[Windows-Usage]]

Wiki links: [[Home]] [[Linux-Usage]] [[macOS-Compatibility]] [[Windows-Usage]]

If you previously used the Docker Hub image (`gmaia325/raylib_container`) note that it may be deprecated or discontinued — prefer the GitHub-hosted image.

If something is missing for your platform, please open an issue in the repository.
